channel.title: Grafana on davegallant.ca
channel.description: Recent content in Grafana on davegallant.ca

item.title: Using Home Assistant and Grafana to Monitor Radon
item.description: I recently became more concerned about radon since I live and work in a basement daily. I decided to explore some ways to, not only monitor radon levels, but also hook up the metrics to my existing homelab.
